heroSubtitle: On September 26, 2014, 43 students from the Ayotzinapa Rural Teachers' College were forcibly disappeared in Iguala, Guerrero. The case remains one of Mexico's most egregious human rights crises. Despite multiple investigations, the full truth has yet to be established.
footerNote: Data compiled from official investigations, GIEI reports, journalistic investigations, and human rights organizations. All contested claims are marked.
